def positive_warning_issued_instead_of_exception_for_invalid_state():
    rule_id = "warning_issued_instead_of_exception_for_invalid_state"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "warnings.warn() issued for an invalid state that should raise an exception instead."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
